source_desc: schema.org's own documentation page for the Person type.
notes: Live in-DOM microdata is the page 'chrome': a BreadcrumbList of ListItems plus many SoftwareSourceCode blocks (the code samples). The per-type Microdata examples shown on the page (a Person example) are HTML-ESCAPED inside <pre>/<code> and are therefore NOT live microdata attributes - a good negative test that an extractor must not extract escaped example markup. itemtype values use https://schema.org/.
